squads.name: Default
squads.description: General-purpose coordinator with the full team available.

squads.name: Dev
squads.description: Software-engineering squad: implement, review, test, debug, and refactor code. Coder/test_writer/refactorer fan out in parallel; investigator gathers read-only evidence and git_agent handles branch/commit hygiene.

squads.name: Ops
squads.description: Infrastructure and incident-triage squad: inspect and operate clusters/services via CLIs and MCP (devops), query and explain databases (db_agent), with the investigator for read-only evidence.

squads.name: Docs
squads.description: Documentation and localisation squad: write docs grounded in code (doc_writer), condense long content (summariser), localise strings/catalogs (translator), with the web agent for reference retrieval.

squads.name: Data
squads.description: Data-analysis squad: parse, aggregate, and report on structured data and logs (data_analyst), with the investigator for locating sources and the summariser for briefing the findings.

squads.name: Skill Editor
squads.description: Skill editing focus: Skill editor plus the web agent for research and reference retrieval, and the Helper for sourcing existing skills and answering questions about yoke.

squads.name: Helper
squads.description: Focused on answering questions about yoke from its documentation and crawling remote registries to find, inspect, and install items on demand. Leaderless: the Helper agent runs directly, limited to its own docs + registries tools.
